stories.headline: Liam Hemsworth attends Taylor Swift’s wedding with Matty Healy’s ex - Page Six
stories.summary: The “Hunger Games” star has a surprising connection to the pop star when it comes to their dating history.
stories.why: This signals how celebrity dating networks have become public scorecards—you're now expected to track who dated whom across A-list circles, making relationship histories as relevant as the relationships themselves.

stories.headline: Catherine shares photos reuniting with family after Three Peaks Challenge - BBC
stories.summary: The princess completed the challenge in aid of the hospital where she was treated for cancer.
stories.why: Catherine's return signals that even royalty uses public challenges to reclaim narrative after health crises, showing how vulnerability and perseverance are now the currency of relevance, not just duty.

stories.headline: Box Office: ‘Obsession’ Surpasses $400 Million Globally - Variety
stories.summary: "Obsession" has notched another major box office milestone.
stories.why: A film hitting $400M globally without being a superhero or franchise tentpole suggests audiences are hungry for original adult narratives—a rare win that matters if you're tired of IP recycling.

stories.headline: Box Office: ‘Minions & Monsters’ Nears $100 Million Overseas, ‘Toy Story 5’ Climbs to $764 Million Globally - Variety
stories.summary: "Minions & Monsters" was far bigger overseas compared to the domestic turnout, while "Toy Story 5" continues to climb at the global box office.
stories.why: Toy Story 5 hitting $764M proves Pixar sequels still have cultural staying power, while Minions' international dominance shows Western audiences may be fragmenting from global blockbuster taste.

stories.headline: Taylor Swift’s Wedding Guests Are Starting To Share Impressions Of That Magical Night At MSG - TODAY.com
stories.summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding guests are sharing their impressions of the nuptials on social media while two particular guests shared details of the event with NBC News.
stories.why: Swift-Kelce wedding guest recaps becoming news means celebrity relationships have evolved into shared cultural events you're expected to have opinions on—like watching your friends' lives through Instagram Stories, but at MSG scale.

stories.headline: Rob Reiner skewers Trump with Jimmy Kimmel in surprise posthumous role - USA Today
stories.summary: Rob Reiner has made a surprise posthumous appearance in Larry David's new HBO show for a sketch skewering President Donald Trump.
stories.why: Reiner's posthumous political bit signals that legacy comedians still hold the cultural authority to define how we mock power, and HBO remains the platform where that commentary lands hardest.

stories.headline: Travis Kelce Reacts to AI Wedding Photo of Him and Taylor Swift — and His Response Is Going Viral - Yahoo
stories.summary: Travis Kelce can definitely take a joke. As his and Taylor Swift‘s celebrity pals arrive in New York City to celebrate their nuptials at Madison Square Garden, comedian Bert Kreischer posted a weddin…
stories.why: Kelce joking about fake wedding photos shows he's aware of the absurdity of his sudden tabloid centrality—self-awareness about celebrity circus is now the only move that keeps you likable in it.
